---
title: "Quarto 2"
author: "Abhineeth Duddela"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
```

```{r}
mpg |>
  ggplot(aes(x = displ, y = hwy, color = class)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5, alpha = 0.75) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, color = "gray30", linewidth = 0.6) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(
    title = "Engine Size vs. Highway Fuel Efficiency",
    subtitle = "Larger engines tend to deliver lower highway mileage",
    x = "Engine Displacement (liters)",
    y = "Highway MPG",
    color = "Vehicle Class",
    caption = "Data: mpg dataset (ggplot2)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40"),
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```
